title: August 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 5''' is the 217th day of the year (218th in leap years), with 148 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1973]] – [[Paul Kasey]] is born.
*[[1987]] – [[Adrian Petriw]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 1]] published.
*1998 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Alec Guinness|Sir Alec Guinness]] dies.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 103|''Star Wars Insider'' 103]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Dark Times: Blue Harvest 0|''Dark Times: Blue Harvest'' 0]] published.
*2009 – [[Invasion 2|''Invasion'' 2]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[A New Hero]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Chopper Saves the Day]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Ezra and the Pilot]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Ezra's Gamble]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Rise of the Rebels]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Zeb to the Rescue]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 8|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 8]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 5|''Star Wars'' (2020) 5]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales 3|''Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales'' 3]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 10|''Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge'' - Episode 10]] premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*2020 – [[Darth Vader (booklet)|''Darth Vader'']] published in French.
*[[2022]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Summer Vacation]]'' released.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel (audiobook)|''Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: I Find Your Lack of Candy Disturbing]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Visions (trade paperback)|Star Wars: Visions Treasury Edition]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's Star Wars: Verily, A New Hope]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Empire Striketh Back: Star Wars Part the Fifth]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Jedi Doth Return: Star Wars Part the Sixth]]'' reprinted.
